# LingoLine

> LingoLine is an AI live phone interpreter that joins a phone call and translates both sides in real time. You merge it into any call using your phone's built-in merge/conference button (or put it on speakerphone) — there is no app to install and it works from any phone.

## What it is
- A real-time, two-way voice translator for live phone calls.
- Joins an existing call as an extra participant via the phone's standard "merge calls" feature (speakerphone also works).
- Translation direction is detected automatically; the AI speaks each side's words in the other language using natural voices.
- No app install, no account needed for the other person, works on mobile and landline.

## Languages (13)
English, Russian, Ukrainian, Spanish, German, French, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Portuguese, Italian, Hindi — any direction.

## Pricing
- Pay-as-you-go: about $0.20 per minute, charged only while talking.
- $2 in free credit on signup; no credit card required to start.
- No subscription, no monthly fee. Top up by card via Stripe.

## Who it's for
People who need to make or take phone calls across a language barrier — immigrants and expats calling clinics, banks, insurance, government lines, leasing offices, and USCIS. Popular with Russian-speaking expats in the US.
